Environment: local
State: <STATE>

Plan: 5 to add, 0 to change, 0 to delete
+ create Policy/default
+ create Project/policy-compile-fixture
+ create Tool/helper
+ create Tool/reader
+ create Tool/shell

Risk delta:
- New policy defines approval requirements (Policy/default).
- Tool/helper will require approval at run (decision=requireApproval, source=explicit_policy_rule).
- Tool/shell will require approval at run (decision=requireApproval, source=explicit_policy_rule).
- [high] Policy/default: sensitive Tool/shell has no explicit approval rule (requiredFor or requireAllTools)
Effective policy (default):
- Tool/helper decision=requireApproval source=explicit_policy_rule
- Tool/reader decision=allow source=safety_metadata
- Tool/shell decision=requireApproval source=explicit_policy_rule
